input_context.escalation_from: L0-Coder (tools executed but file content had escaped newlines)

output_preview:
### Step 1: Analyze Previous Failures
L0 failed twice because they executed the file_write() tool calls correctly but formatted the file contents with escaped `\n` characters instead of actual newlines inside the triple-quoted strings. This resulted in flat, single-line files that wouldn't compile or run properly (e.g., all code on one line, breaking Go syntax). Root cause: **Knowledge gap** in how to properly format multi-line strings in tool calls for code generation—likely unfamiliarity with ...
